center.name: 埃尔卡拉法特
center.summary: 埃尔卡拉法特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Austral negrito，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The austral negrito or Patagonian negrito (Lessonia rufa) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay and has occurred as a vagrant in Peru and on the Falkland Islands.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The austral negrito or Patagonian negrito (Lessonia rufa) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay and has occurred as a vagrant in Peru and on the Falkland Islands.Remsen, J
